name: Hawaiian Sweet-And-Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Garlic powder or minced garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, eggs, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, onion, pepper, nutmeg, salt, and garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Brown the meatballs on all sides.
4. In a large saucepan, combine the remaining cornstarch, soy sauce, vinegar, water, brown sugar, and pineapple juice. Cook until thickened, stirring constantly.
5. Add the meatballs, fruit, and peppers to the saucepan. Simmer for 5 minutes or until the fruit is well heated.
6. Serve and enjoy!
